name: 我在西游开黑店
developer: Jinan Rhythm Interactive Entertainment Network Co., Ltd.
publisher: Jinan Rhythm Interactive Entertainment Network Co., Ltd.
short_description: This is a simulation management game set in the world of Journey to the West, where players take on the role of a merchant running a shop in this mythical realm. At the start of the game, the player has only 10 days of lifespan remaining. You earn spirit stones to extend your life。
detailed_description:
In this mystical world of Journey to the West, where immortal auras fill the air and demonic energy soars sky-high, gods are fighting, demons are fleeing—it's absolute chaos. And you? You’re not some noble hero sent to save the world. You’re not even a bodyguard for Tang Sanzang.

You’re...
a shopkeeper.

And worse yet, you’ve only got 10 days to live. The shop just opened, and your death countdown is already ticking.

【Barely Logged In and Already Dying? 10-Day Lifespan, Limited-Time Business Begins!】

The moment you enter the game, the system hits you with a brutal message:
“Lifespan remaining: 10 days. You're on your own. Do not disturb the NPCs.”

Time is tight, pressure is high, and every second feels like the sands of your life are gushing out of a broken hourglass. You're forced to run your shop while freaking out about how to stay alive.

No spirit stones? You won't just die early—you'll die broke.
You’ll have to claw spirit stones from every immortal and demon customer who walks through your door, fighting for life extension, cultivation, and maybe—just maybe—a miracle comeback.

【Even Shopkeeping is a Grind? These Days, Even Demons Watch Their Wallets】

In this world where “might makes right,” dreaming of making a fortune through honest business?

Reality will humble you—demons aren’t dumb, and even gods haggle.

You’ll need sharp eyes to spot the big spenders, and a silver tongue that can sweet-talk better than a demon king.

Every deal must be calculated down to the last stone. Every single spirit stone could mean another breath of immortal air—
Doesn’t living one more day sound nice?

【Going Rogue? Go All In—Steal, Rob, and Scam If You Must】

Think shopkeeping is too slow and wholesome? Then go full rogue, like:

See a customer lugging a mountain of spirit stones? Rob them.
Can’t win the fight? Steal it.
Can’t negotiate? Use a soul-capturing spell and force the deal!

In short, if you’ve got the guts, your wallet can be as round as a demon’s belly.

Of course, these “soulful” tactics come with serious risks.

Succeed in robbing someone, and congrats—you instantly earn a wanted poster and get labeled a “High-Risk Individual” across every city. Banned from civilization, you’ll have to flee to the infamous “Sea of Blood,” where only the toughest survive.

From that point on, your life isn’t just “Open for Business”—it’s “Wanted and on the Run.”

【Lifespan on Red Alert, But You’ve Still Got to Grind, Fight, and Level Up】

Lifespan pressure is only half the battle. The other half? Cultivation.

You’re not just extending your life until your hair’s flying in all directions—you also need to grind hard and level up to become a Golden Immortal.

Because the higher your level, the better your chances at robbing.
Better levels mean better storage bags, with more capacity and higher item value.
You’ll also gain access to higher-tier cities, where you can sell your goods for top prices.

In short: leveling up is the capital for staying alive.
Your level is the key to robbing riches and living longer.

【Welcome to the High-Stakes Shopkeeper Saga of Journey to the West!】

Join this thrilling, money-making, laugh-out-loud Journey to the West business adventure!

In a world of rampant monsters and unpredictable hearts, use your wit to manage your business and your courage to steal your future.

Go from a lowly shopkeeper with a ticking death timer to a spirit stone reaping machine,
Live longer, earn more, and rise to fame across the great cities!

This time, you’re not here to fetch scriptures—
You’re here to fetch your life—and only you can save it.
